title: Illager Expansion [Rematch]
description: A Fabric Mod that focuses on expanding content surrounding the mysterious Illagers in Minecraft! Updated for 1.19+
body: # Illager Expansion is now deprecated in favour of Illager Invasion by Fuzs # https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion **Illager Expansion [Rematch]** is mod focused around bringing more content to the mysterious Illagers in minecraft. From new strucutres to mobs and items we have you covered. Will you be able to find all of the secrets of the Illagers before its to late? ## What can I expect? - **5 new structures** - **10 new enemies** - **21 new items** - **A new boss** - **Enhanced Raids** - **Revamped Mansions** **Are you looking for more powerful gear?** Look no further then the imbuing table, a multi block enchanting station in which you can take your gear to the next level: **Want to see more? Check out the gallery tab** *The Illagers are ready for a rematch, are you?*
